description: This strappy number will raise your glam quotient when you pair it with skinny jeans or a little black dress for a night out with the girls. Its sturdy soles and vibrant interlaced straps are just perfect for strutting around! Giving your feet that delicate look, yet comfortable feel. Upper Criss-cross straps across the midfoot joining at the heel collar Zippered heel collar Soft footbed for instep comfort Embossed branding on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with flower shaped heel for enhanced grip and traction Textured grooves with embossed brand name on the outsole Sandal Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
